mdSummary:
# Scrollspy

Highlights the nav item matching the current scroll section.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/scrollspy

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Scrollspy | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Scrollspy | Offset | `int` | `` |  |
| Scrollspy | Smooth | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Scrollspy | ActiveId | `string?` | `` |  |
| Scrollspy | ActiveIdChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Scrollspy | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Scrollspy | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ScrollspyLink | Context | `Scrollspy.ScrollspyContext?` | `` |  |
| ScrollspyLink | Target | `string` | `""` |  |
| ScrollspyLink | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ScrollspyLink | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ScrollspyLink | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ScrollspySection | Id | `string` | `""` |  |
| ScrollspySection | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ScrollspySection | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ScrollspySection | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Scrollspy) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ScrollspyLink) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ScrollspySection) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ActiveIdChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`)

## Sub-components
- `ScrollspyLink`, `ScrollspySection`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Scrollspy.ScrollspyContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Scrollspy />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Scrollspy/Scrollspy.razor`
- `UI/Scrollspy/ScrollspyLink.razor`
- `UI/Scrollspy/ScrollspySection.razor`
